auth.mfaRequired: Two-factor authentication is required. Please enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
auth.mfaCodeHelper: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app. Make sure your device clock is synchronized.
auth.mfaVerificationFailed: MFA verification failed. Please check that your code is correct, your device clock is synchronized, and try again.
auth.invalidMfaCode: Invalid MFA code. Please enter a 6-digit number.
auth.mfaSessionExpired: MFA session expired. Please log in again.
auth.googleLoginNoAccount: No account matches this Google email. Use your work credentials or contact an administrator.
auth.googleLoginMfaPolicy: Your role requires two-factor authentication. Sign in with username and password after enabling MFA in Settings.
auth.googleLoginOauthFailed: Google sign-in failed. Try again or use username and password.
auth.forgotPasswordIntro: Enter your account email. After verification (email code or authenticator app), a request will be recorded and an administrator will be notified.
auth.forgotPasswordMessagePlaceholder: E.g. I can no longer sign in since…
auth.forgotPasswordStepEmail: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email.
auth.forgotPasswordStepTotp: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, etc.).
auth.forgotPasswordOtpHint: The code was sent to the account email address. It expires in a few minutes.
auth.forgotPasswordTotpHint: Use the same app you use to sign in to the portal.
auth.forgotPasswordVerifyFailed: Invalid code or expired session. Try again from the previous step.
auth.forgotPasswordSuccess: Your request has been recorded. An administrator has been notified.
auth.forgotPasswordError: Could not submit the request. Try again later.

mfa.title: Two-Factor Authentication (MFA)
mfa.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account
mfa.toggleHint: Require a code from an authenticator app when you sign in. Turn on to start setup, or off to disable (code required).
mfa.notEnabled: Two-factor authentication is not enabled for your account.
mfa.enabledDescription: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication. You'll need to enter a code from your authenticator app when logging in.
mfa.setupInstructions: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.) or enter the secret manually:
mfa.step1: Open your authenticator app on your phone
mfa.step2: Scan the QR code below or enter the secret manually
mfa.step3: Enter the 6-digit code from your app to activate MFA
mfa.activationHelper: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
mfa.setupFailed: Failed to setup MFA. Please try again.
mfa.activationFailed: Failed to activate MFA. Please check your code and try again.
mfa.disableWarning: Are you sure you want to disable MFA? This will reduce the security of your account.
mfa.disableHelper: Enter your current 6-digit code to confirm
mfa.disableFailed: Failed to disable MFA. Please check your code and try again.

publicBooking.title: Book an appointment
publicBooking.subtitle: Public booking — you will receive a confirmation email.
publicBooking.successMessage: Request submitted. Keep the QR code below for fast check-in at reception.
publicBooking.qrHint: Show this code at reception on the day of your visit.
publicBooking.qrDownloadFailed: Could not download the QR code. Try again or take a screenshot.
publicBooking.qrDownloadOpenTab: A new tab should show the QR image: right-click it and choose “Save image as…”.
publicBooking.qrDownloadPopupBlocked: Your browser blocked the download or pop-up. Allow pop-ups for this site, or take a screenshot of the QR code.
publicBooking.errorGeneric: Could not submit the request. Check your details or try again later.
publicBooking.errorOrganizerNotFound: No account matches this email, or this person cannot receive public booking requests. Enter the exact work email of a director, analyst, or master user as registered in the app.
publicBooking.errorSlotUnavailable: This time slot is no longer available. Please choose another date or time.
publicBooking.visitorPhotoHint: JPEG, PNG or WebP, max 5 MB — for reception check-in.
publicBooking.visitorIdDocumentHint: Photo or scan — JPEG, PNG or WebP, max 5 MB.

publicHome.title: GECOR
publicHome.intro: Electronic Mail and Appointments Management — Public portal.
publicHome.sectionInfoBody: Information and instructions are provided here.
publicHome.sectionVisitBody: For faster check-in, use the QR code you receive after booking. Please bring a valid ID.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.s1Body:
This privacy policy describes how the GECOR application (the “Service”) processes personal data when you use the public portal (appointments, information) or when you authenticate as staff to access internal features (mail, calendar, reception, administration).

The organisation operating the Service is responsible for determining the purposes and means of processing. Contact your data protection officer or legal department if you need the identity of the controller for your deployment.
privacy.s2Body:
Depending on how you use the Service, we may process: account and authentication data (identifier, email, role, security settings such as MFA); technical connection data (logs, IP address, timestamps); content and metadata related to mail and documents processed in the application; data relating to appointments and visitors (name, contact details, company, visit slot, optional documents or photos if your organisation enables these features); and any information you voluntarily enter into forms or profile fields.

The exact list of fields depends on your organisation’s configuration and your role.
privacy.s3Body:
Data is processed to provide the Service (account management, workflows, notifications), ensure security (fraud prevention, access control, audit where enabled), meet legal obligations applicable to your organisation, and, where appropriate, pursue legitimate interests such as improving availability and support — balanced against your rights.

Where consent is required for a specific processing operation, it will be collected separately in accordance with applicable law.
privacy.s4Body: Personal data is kept only for the time necessary for the purposes described, in line with your organisation’s retention policies and legal requirements. The Service implements appropriate technical and organisational measures (access controls, encryption in transit where configured, backups, traceability) without guaranteeing absolute security of transmissions over the Internet.
privacy.s5Body:
Subject to applicable law, you may have the right to access, rectify or erase your data, restrict or object to certain processing, request portability where relevant, and withdraw consent when processing is based on consent. You may also lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.

To exercise your rights, contact your organisation’s administrator or designated privacy contact. Response times and exceptions (e.g. legal retention) follow applicable regulations.
privacy.s6Body: This policy may be updated to reflect changes to the Service or legal requirements. The “Last updated” date will be revised; material changes may be communicated by your organisation through the usual channels. Continued use of the Service after an update constitutes acceptance where permitted by law.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.s1Body: By accessing or using the GECOR application (the “Service”), you agree to these terms of use. If you use the Service on behalf of an organisation, you represent that you have authority to bind that organisation. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.
terms.s2Body: The Service provides tools for managing electronic mail, appointments, reception and related workflows, according to modules and permissions configured by your organisation. Features may evolve; availability is provided on a best-effort basis. The Service may be suspended for maintenance, security or legal reasons.
terms.s3Body: You must provide accurate information and keep your credentials confidential. You must not misuse the Service: no attempt to breach security, access data without authorisation, introduce malware, overload systems, or use the Service in violation of law or internal policies. Your organisation may define additional rules; non-compliance may result in suspension of access and disciplinary or legal action.
terms.s4Body: Your organisation retains rights to data and documents it processes through the Service. The software, branding and documentation of the Service remain the property of their respective owners. Unless expressly permitted, you may not copy, reverse engineer or redistribute the Service.
terms.s5Body: The Service is provided “as is” to the extent permitted by law. No guarantee is given of uninterrupted or error-free operation. To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, liability for indirect or consequential damages is excluded, and aggregate liability is limited as allowed by law and your organisation’s agreements. Nothing in these terms excludes liability that cannot be limited by law.
terms.s6Body: These terms may be updated. The “Last updated” date will change. Your organisation may notify you of material changes. Continued use after publication may constitute acceptance where permitted by law.
terms.s7Body: Mandatory consumer or employee protections may apply regardless of the following. Subject to those provisions, the law and jurisdiction applicable to your relationship with the organisation operating the Service shall govern disputes. For staff users, internal procedures may apply first.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.loadError: Some data could not be loaded. Showing available information.
dashboard.sectionOrgTotalsHint: All mail items and all appointments in the system (every user).
dashboard.sectionMailMineHint: Mail assigned to you or created by you
dashboard.sectionAppointmentsHint: Schedule for the next 60 days unless noted
dashboard.sectionAppointmentsMineHint: Your appointments as host — next 60 days (up to 500 loaded)
dashboard.delaysHint: Average processing times (hours, from document creation)
dashboard.delayToApproved: Until first approval: avg {{avg}} h, median {{med}} h (n={{n}})
dashboard.delayToArchived: Until first archive: avg {{avg}} h, median {{med}} h (n={{n}})

mail.title: Mail Management
mail.subtitle: Manage and track all your documents
mail.noDocuments: No documents found. Click "Upload Document" to add one.
mail.searchPlaceholder: Search documents by title, reference, or description...
mail.bulkDeleteConfirm: Permanently delete {{count}} selected document(s)? This cannot be undone.

upload.title: Upload Document
upload.dragDrop: Drag & drop a file here, or click to select

viewer.confirmDeleteBody: This permanently removes the mail and attached files. This cannot be undone.
viewer.requestDeletionHint: A director will review your request. You can add an optional reason below.
viewer.requestDeleteFailed: Could not submit the deletion request.
viewer.routingServiceHint: Select the service that will handle this mail after assignment.
viewer.executiveArchiveConfirm: Archive this mail immediately as director? The document will move to “Archived” without going through intermediate workflow steps.

signature.existingSignature: A signature already exists for this document. You can modify it below.

appointments.title: Appointments
appointments.locationCustomRequired: Enter a location when « Specify » is selected.
appointments.selectTimes: Please select start and end times
appointments.endBeforeStart: End time must be after start time
appointments.loadFailed: Failed to load appointments. Please try again.

workflowMatrix.title: Appointment capability map
workflowMatrix.intro: The items below map to “Appointments” permissions in group administration.

management.title: Management
management.body: Create; update (time, location, notes); cancel or request cancellation; reschedule via slot proposal; delete (privileged roles).

coordination.title: Coordination
coordination.body: Agenda / talking points; confirm appointment (solicited host); check organizer availability (free slots).

decision.title: Decision
decision.body: Hierarchy validation after a slot is proposed (executive), or reject (cancellation) — dedicated API.

automation.title: Automation
automation.body: In-app and e-mail notifications; reminders (reminder_sent tracking); conflict detection on create / slot proposal.

post.title: After the meeting
post.body: Minutes; follow-up tasks; mark completed or no-show (operational closure).

appointments.solicitedPersonRequired: Select the person the visitor is meeting.
appointments.visitHostsLoadError: Could not load the list of hosts. Try again.
appointments.noVisitHosts: No eligible user is available as a visit host.
appointments.visitorPhotoWebcamError: Could not access the camera. Check permissions and that a camera is available.
appointments.visitorPhotoHint: Optional — JPEG, PNG or WebP, max 5 MB.
appointments.visitorPhotoTooLarge: Image must be 5 MB or smaller.
appointments.visitorPhotoZoomHint: Use the slider to zoom, or Ctrl + scroll wheel over the image. Scroll to pan when zoomed in.
appointments.visitorIdDocumentHint: Optional — photo or scan of ID card / passport, JPEG, PNG or WebP, max 5 MB.
appointments.visitorIdDocumentZoomHint: Use the slider to zoom, or Ctrl + scroll wheel over the image. Scroll to pan when zoomed in.
appointments.pendingCancellationNotice: A cancellation request is awaiting director approval.

appointments.requestCancellationHint: A director will review your request. You can add an optional reason below.

appointments.checkInFailed: Could not check in the visitor.
appointments.visitorAlreadyCheckedIn: This visitor has already checked in.
appointments.finalizeReceptionHint: Validates the record and sends a confirmation email to the visitor when an email address is present (one send unless you use resend).
appointments.forceResendEmail: Resend visitor email if already sent
appointments.bulkCancelConfirm: Cancel {{count}} selected appointment(s)? Hosts are notified when applicable.

appointments.filtersResultHint: Filters apply to the list below (search covers title, description, visitor, contact fields, location).

deletionRequests.title: Deletion requests
deletionRequests.subtitle: Review mail deletion and appointment cancellation requests
deletionRequests.approveHint: The mail will be permanently deleted or the appointment cancelled.

reception.title: Reception Dashboard
reception.calendarEmpty: No appointments or mail items to show in this range.
reception.calendarSelectSlotHint: You can also click and drag on an empty area of the calendar to open the form with that time range.
reception.calendarHoverCreateHint: Hover a calendar cell to show the “Create appointment” button, or click and drag on an empty range to pre-fill times.
reception.loadFailed: Failed to load appointments. Please try again.
reception.serverError: Server error while loading appointments. Please contact the administrator.
reception.networkError: Connection error. Please check your network connection and ensure the server is accessible.

settings.title: Settings
settings.appearanceDescription: Language and how the app looks on this device.
settings.themeDescription: “Match system” follows your device or browser light/dark setting.
settings.securityDescription: Protect your account with two-factor authentication (TOTP).
settings.languageDescription: Choose your preferred language for the interface
settings.languageEmailSync: When signed in, this is saved for notification emails too (French or English).
settings.googleCalendarDescription: Link your Google account to sync confirmed appointments to your primary Google Calendar.
settings.forcedPasswordChangeIntro: Enter your current password (including a temporary one), then choose a new secure password.
settings.passwordChangeTooShort: The new password must be at least 8 characters.
settings.passwordChangeMismatch: Confirmation does not match the new password.
settings.passwordChangeError: Could not change password. Check your current password.
settings.passwordChangeSectionIntro: To change your password, enter your current password and the new one. You will be asked for a 6-digit code: by email if MFA is not enabled, otherwise from your authenticator app (TOTP).
settings.passwordChangeOtpHintTotp: Open your authenticator app and enter the 6-digit code to confirm the change.
settings.passwordChangeOtpHintEmail: A code was sent to your email address. Enter it below to confirm the change.
settings.passwordChangeOtpInvalid: The code must be exactly 6 digits.
settings.passwordChangeErrorSame: The new password must be different from the current one.
settings.passwordChangeErrorChallenge: This code has expired or is no longer valid. Start again from the beginning.
settings.passwordChangeErrorSmtp: Could not send the code by email (SMTP not configured or send failed). Contact an administrator or enable MFA to use an authenticator code.
settings.notificationSoundsDescription: A short tone can play for new notifications (bell list and Web Push if enabled). Choose a tone per type: mail, appointments, or other alerts (e.g. password-reset reminders). Some browsers require a page gesture before audio can play.
settings.notificationSoundsSynced: These settings are saved to your account and mirrored on this device for audio and the service worker.
settings.notificationSoundOtherHint: Examples: admin reminders, alerts outside mail or appointment workflow.

usersAdmin.title: Users and roles
usersAdmin.subtitle: Account list and system roles (admin access)
usersAdmin.loadError: Could not load users. Check your permissions (director or master).
usersAdmin.rolesIntro: Roles define permissions in the application. Only a master account can change a user's role.
usersAdmin.noUsersMatchFilters: No users match the current filters.

roleDesc.master: Full access; can change other users' roles.
roleDesc.director: Mail and appointment validation, deletion requests.
roleDesc.receptionist: Inbound mail registration and visitor reception.
roleDesc.archivist: Final archiving and restoration of mail.

usersAdmin.createUserValidation: Please fill in all required fields.
usersAdmin.groupsModalIntro: Each role is a group. Tick the permissions that apply to that group, then save for that group. Only a master account can change permissions.
usersAdmin.createGroupNameHelper: Lowercase letters, digits and underscore only; 2–48 characters; must start with a letter (e.g. project_support).
usersAdmin.createGroupNameInvalid: Invalid name. Use the format described in the help text.
usersAdmin.customGroupsHint: Additional groups you create appear in this window and can be assigned when creating or editing users.
usersAdmin.deleteGroupConfirm: Permanently delete the group "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone. If any users still have this group, reassign them first.
usersAdmin.resetPasswordMustChangeLabel: User must change this password at next sign-in
usersAdmin.resetPasswordMustChangeHint: If unchecked, the user keeps this password with no forced change.
usersAdmin.activityEmpty: No audit entries for this user.
usersAdmin.activityNoPermission: The audit log requires the “admin.audit” permission.
usersAdmin.cannotDeactivateSelf: You cannot deactivate your own account here.

passwordResetRequests.title: Password reset requests
passwordResetRequests.subtitle: Requests submitted after email or MFA verification. Use “Reset password” to apply the policy password (.env) or a custom one; date and mode appear in the table. Or mark completed / rejected. Reminders stop when closed.
passwordResetRequests.resetPasswordMustChange: User must change password at next sign-in
passwordResetRequests.resetPasswordNoUser: No linked account: use user administration.
